zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend Richard Ravens於1562年4月1日之前出生在英國艾可迪德哈姆時，他的父親William Ravens43歲，母親Joan Starlyng43歲。他於大約1588年與Elizabeth Hedge在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1626年4月3日在英國素福爾可華迪斯費爾德，埋葬在英國素福爾可華迪斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Ravens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): variant of Raven , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Raven
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Raven (Old Norse Hrafn, Old English Hræfn, both meaning ‘raven’) or else a nickname from this word, probably denoting a dark-haired man.

English: occasionally perhaps also a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a raven (see 1 above). Surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English.
North German and Dutch: from Middle Low German rave(n) ‘raven’, a nickname or an old personal name. Compare 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend Richard Ravens was born before 1 April 1562, in Dedham, Essex, England, his father, William Ravens, was 43 and his mother, Joan Starlyng, was 43. He married Elizabeth Hedge about 1588, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 April 1626, in Wattisfield, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Wattisfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend Richard Ravens est né avant 1 avril 1562, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Ravens, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan Starlyng, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hedge environ 1588, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1626, à Wattisfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Wattisfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Er hat um 1588 in Dedham, Essex, England Elizabeth Hedge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. ja.lifeSummary: Reverend Richard Ravensが1562年4月1日以前にイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父William Ravensは43歳，母Joan Starlyngは43歳であった。約1588年にイギリスエセックスデドハムでElizabeth Hedgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1626年4月3日にイギリススフォルクワッティスフィールドで死去し，イギリススフォルクワッティスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend Richard Ravens(이)가 1562년 4월 1일 이전 영국 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ravens(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Starlyng(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1588년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Elizabeth Hedge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1626년 4월 3일 영국 수폴크 왓티스필드에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 왓티스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend Richard Ravens nasceu antes 1 de abril de 1562, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ravens, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan Starlyng, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hedge aproximadamente 1588, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1626, em Wattisfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Wattisfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend Richard Ravens родился перед 1 апрель 1562 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ravens было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Starlyng, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hedge около 1588 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 апреля 1626 г. в местности ваттисфиелд, суффолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности ваттисфиелд, суффолк, Англия.
